examples: Common symptoms include reduced visual acuity, visual distortion (metamorphosia, macropsia and micropsia).
Common symptoms include reduced visual acuity , blurred vision , visual distortion metamorphosia , macropsia and micropsia , discrete scotoma , and reading difficulty.
Common symptoms include reduced visual acuity , blurred vision , visual distortion ( metamorphosia , macropsia and micropsia ) , discrete scotoma , and reading difficulty.
